case_title: COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY, A CORP. vs. PARRISH, BONITA et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY, A CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARRISH, BONITA $863.00 PRINCIPAL, $215.75 ATTORNEY FEES, $60.41 INTEREST, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,249.16

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 610, HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, CALENDAR OF NOV-12-1999, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER EXCEPT FOR THE SUM OF $20.00 TO BE WITHHELD FROM EACH PAY PERIOD. ALSO, THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ONE HALF OF ANY EARNINGS TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR AND ONE HALF OF ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT
